stories.title: Live updates: Serena Williams vs. Maya Joint
stories.summary: Williams plays Joint in her first singles match in nearly four years.

stories.title: LeBron tells Lakers he plans to play elsewhere
stories.summary: James has informed the Lakers that the franchise can move on without him because he will play elsewhere, Klutch Sports CEO Rich Paul told ESPN's Shams Charania on Tuesday.

stories.title: SCOTUS upholds bans on transgender athletes
stories.summary: The Supreme Court on Tuesday issued a decision to uphold state laws barring transgender girls and women from playing on school athletic teams.

stories.title: Blazers, Williams reach 3-year, $44M extension
stories.summary: The Portland Trail Blazers and center Robert Williams III have agreed to a three-year, $44 million contract extension, his agent Kevin Bradbury of LIFT Sports Management tells ESPN.

stories.title: Source: Panthers acquire Devils goalie Markstrom
stories.summary: The Panthers have acquired goaltender Jacob Markstrom from the Devils as part of a five-player deal, the team announced Tuesday.
